metadata.expression: VAR HotelName = LOOKUPVALUE(Params[Value], Params[Parameter], "HotelName") RETURN HotelName & "  |  GM Daily Dashboard"
SWITCH(     SELECTEDVALUE('Revenue Categories'[Category]),     "Room Revenue", [Room Revenue],     "F&B Revenue", [FB Revenue],     "Other Revenue", SUM(Fact_DailyFlash[OtherRevenue]) )
VAR HotelName = LOOKUPVALUE(Params[Value], Params[Parameter], "HotelName") RETURN HotelName & "  |  Sales - Account Review"
// F&B covers as a % of rooms — key for kitchen planning DIVIDE(     [Forecast Pax Covers],     [Forecast Rooms] )
VAR HotelName = LOOKUPVALUE(Params[Value], Params[Parameter], "HotelName") RETURN HotelName & "  |  8-Day Package Forecast"
// Package revenue as % of total — shows dependency on packages DIVIDE(     [Forecast Package Revenue],     [Forecast Total Value] )

// Room only rooms as % of total — shows how many guests have no F&B commitment DIVIDE(     CALCULATE(         [Forecast Rooms],         Dim_PackageCode[IsRoomOnly] = TRUE()     ),     [Forecast Rooms] )
DIVIDE(     [Forecast Total Value],     CALCULATE([Forecast Total Value], ALL(Dim_PackageCode)) )
[Tooltip Package Revenue Mix %] - [Tooltip Package Room Mix %]
DIVIDE(     [Profile Total Revenue],     CALCULATE([Profile Total Revenue], ALL(Fact_ProfileProduction)) )

VAR Top3Revenue =     SUMX(         TOPN(             3,             VALUES(Fact_ProfileProduction[ProfileName]),             [Profile Total Revenue],             DESC         ),         [Profile Total Revenue]     ) RETURN DIVIDE(Top3Revenue, [Profile Total Revenue])

VAR Pct = [Revenue Concentration Top3] RETURN IF(     Pct >= 0.60,     "⚠  Top 3 accounts = " & FORMAT(Pct, "0.0%") & " of revenue — high concentration risk",     IF(         Pct >= 0.40,         "⚡  Top 3 accounts = " & FORMAT(Pct, "0.0%") & " — consider diversifying",         "✓  Healthy mix — top 3 accounts = " & FORMAT(Pct, "0.0%")     ) )
DIVIDE(     [Profile Room Nights],     CALCULATE([Profile Room Nights], ALL(Fact_ProfileProduction)) )

VAR Result =     DIVIDE(         [Room Revenue MTD] - [Room Revenue MTD LY],         [Room Revenue MTD LY]     ) RETURN IF(     ISBLANK(Result),     BLANK(),     IF(Result >= 0, "+" , "-")         & FORMAT(ABS(Result), "0.0%") )
COALESCE(     CALCULATE(         COUNTROWS(Fact_Reservations),         USERELATIONSHIP(Fact_Reservations[BookingDate], DimDate[Date]),         DimDate[Date] = TODAY()     ),     0 )
COALESCE(     CALCULATE(         COUNTROWS(Fact_Reservations),         USERELATIONSHIP(Fact_Reservations[BookingDate], DimDate[Date]),         DimDate[Date] = TODAY() - 1     ),     0 )

COALESCE(     CALCULATE(         COUNTROWS(Fact_Reservations),         USERELATIONSHIP(Fact_Reservations[BookingDate], DimDate[Date]),         DimDate[Date] >= TODAY() - 7,         DimDate[Date] <= TODAY()     ),     0 )

COALESCE(     CALCULATE(         COUNTROWS(Fact_Reservations),         USERELATIONSHIP(Fact_Reservations[BookingDate], DimDate[Date]),         DimDate[Date] >= TODAY() - 30,         DimDate[Date] <= TODAY()     ),     0 )

COALESCE(     CALCULATE(         COUNTROWS(Fact_Reservations),         Fact_Reservations[ReservationStatus] = "Cancelled",         USERELATIONSHIP(Fact_Reservations[BookingDate], DimDate[Date]),         DimDate[Date] >= TODAY() - 7,         DimDate[Date] <= TODAY()     ),     0 )

COALESCE(     CALCULATE(         COUNTROWS(Fact_Reservations),         Fact_Reservations[ReservationStatus] = "Reserved",         Fact_Reservations[ArrivalDate] >= TODAY(),         Fact_Reservations[ArrivalDate] <= TODAY() + 7     ),     0 )

COALESCE(     CALCULATE(         COUNTROWS(Fact_Reservations),         Fact_Reservations[ReservationStatus] = "Reserved",         Fact_Reservations[ArrivalDate] >= TODAY(),         Fact_Reservations[ArrivalDate] <= TODAY() + 30     ),     0 )
DIVIDE(     [Revenue on Books],     [Nights on Books],     BLANK() )

VAR HotelName =     CALCULATE(         LOOKUPVALUE(Params[Value], Params[Parameter], "HotelName"),         ALL(Params)     ) RETURN IF(ISBLANK(HotelName), "Hotel Name", HotelName) & "  |  Sales Daily"
VAR HotelName = LOOKUPVALUE(Params[Value], Params[Parameter], "HotelName") RETURN HotelName & "  |  Sales Daily"

IF(     CALCULATE(         COUNTROWS(Fact_Reservations),         Fact_Reservations[ReservationStatus] = "Reserved",         Fact_Reservations[ArrivalDate] >= TODAY(),         Fact_Reservations[ArrivalDate] <= TODAY() + 7     ) > 0,     1,     0 )
